note: EvryJewels is a referenced Yuma customer. The on-site widget is Gorgias Chat; the AI auto-reply is delivered as a single block over the chat WebSocket (no token streaming). Client-side attribution between Yuma and Gorgias's own AI Agent is not verifiable; figures reflect the in-chat AI reply latency a shopper experiences.
metric: send -> first agent (AI) message frame over WebSocket (fromAgent=true)

results.a: Yes, we do offer free shipping! To qualify, your order subtotal must be at least $35 USD after discounts and before taxes. Add-on services like Package Protection and the 1 Year Warranty are excluded from this minimum.
We do not offer any refunds, exchanges, or returns. This is stated on our website (refund-policy). Could you please let us know why you are requesting a return or refund?

results.q: Are your rings adjustable or do they come in fixed sizes?
results.a: Our rings come in both adjustable and fixed sizes, depending on the design! Many pieces, like the Double Date Ring, feature an adjustable design; other styles come in fixed sizes ranging from 5 to 9.
